creator: bobf@mrp3.com
text:
some skipping and other apparant multimedia timing issues seem to remain from the earlier release in 14.1 RELEASE (anecdotally observed in an icecast stream, fed by ices) but it seems to be less frequent and much less severe from before.

The problem seems to surface as multimedia timing errors in a live stream, as if a timing correction is being inaccurately applied to the clock used by icecast and/or ices (whichever one is applying the time codes to the audio stream).
